texto: Men who leave their mark on the world are very often those who, being gifted and full of nervous power, are at the same time haunted and driven by a dominant idea, and are therefore within a measurable distance of insanity.
explicacao: Citação de Francis Galton sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Men who leave their mark on the world are very often those who, being gifted and full of nervous …” articula reflexao, insanity, leave em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
